mapper.update: UPDATE menu_tbl SET menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_info = #{menuInfo}, menu_price = #{menuPrice}, menu_category = #{menuCategory}, menu_image = #{menuImage} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_menu_map (menu_id, product_id, container_count) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{productId}, #{count})
